SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.ctl.dsl.gen

Class CtlDslBaseListener

java.lang.Object
hu.bme.mit.theta.ctl.dsl.gen.CtlDslBaseListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
CtlDslListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
public class CtlDslBaseListener extends Object implements CtlDslListener
This class provides an empty implementation of CtlDslListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CtlDslBaseListener()

    • enterModel

      public void enterModel(CtlDslParser.ModelContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.model().

      The default implementation does nothing.

      Specified by:
      enterModel in interface CtlDslListener
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree

      Exit a parse tree produced by the IntLitExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.primaryArith().

      The default implementation does nothing.
